mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluate (task_id, user_id, score, content, create_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{userId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, user_id, score, content, create_time FROM evaluate WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM evaluate ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluate SET task_id = #{taskId}, user_id = #{userId}, score = #{score}, content = #{content}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
